name: AllergyIntoleranceCategory
title: AllergyIntolerance ARIA Category
description:
This value set defines different allergy types configured in Aria. 
List of configured allergy categories are available under valueset 'aria-allergy-category'. 
All values can be accessed using $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-category.
